---
title: "SaddlePoint"
description: "Academic and technical blog — statistics, machine learning, and adjacent topics."
comments: false
listing:
  id: sp-posts
  contents: .
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  feed:
    title: "SaddlePoint — Soma S Dhavala"
    description: "Academic and technical writing on statistics, ML, and adjacent topics."
  fields: [date, title, categories, description, reading-time]
---

::: {.subscribe}
```{=html}
<form action="https://github.us18.list-manage.com/subscribe/post?u=82b9a1ff5bc2e4c89a646fcea&amp;id=c48700ad96&amp;f_id=004bade6f0" method="post" target="_blank" novalidate>
  <input type="email" name="EMAIL" placeholder="Type your email…" aria-label="Email address" required>
  <div style="position:absolute;left:-5000px" aria-hidden="true"><input type="text" name="b_82b9a1ff5bc2e4c89a646fcea_c48700ad96" tabindex="-1" value=""></div>
  <button type="submit">Subscribe</button>
</form>
```
:::

::: {#sp-posts}
:::
